esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-postgresqlreceiver.otel-*
// Locks by mode; ExclusiveLock and AccessExclusiveLock indicate contention
| WHERE postgresql.database.locks IS NOT NULL
| WHERE attributes.mode IN ("ExclusiveLock", "AccessExclusiveLock")
| STATS lock_count = SUM(postgresql.database.locks) BY service.instance.id, attributes.mode
// Threshold: > 5 exclusive locks; adjust for your workload
| WHERE lock_count > 5
